allow: PowerShell(python -c "import cupy; print\('cupy version:', cupy.__version__\); print\('cuda available:', cupy.cuda.is_available\(\)\); print\('runtime version:', cupy.cuda.runtime.runtimeGetVersion\(\)\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell(python -c "import torch; print\('torch:', torch.__version__\); print\('cuda available:', torch.cuda.is_available\(\)\); print\('cuda version \(built\):', torch.version.cuda\); print\('device name:', torch.cuda.get_device_name\(0\) if torch.cuda.is_available\(\) else 'N/A'\)" 2>&1)
PowerShell(python -c "import cupy; print\('cupy:', cupy.__version__\); print\('cuda available:', cupy.cuda.is_available\(\)\); import spacy; print\('prefer_gpu:', spacy.prefer_gpu\(\)\)" 2>&1)
